hooks.command:
printf '
  ENTROPIC PICTURES PRESENTS

  a CLAUDE production

  starring
  CLAUDE

  with
  THE TERMINAL
  THE COMPILER
  and DENNIS K. as "The Mentor"

  [YOUR SESSION HAS BEGUN]

'

printf '
  [END OF FEATURE]

  CAST (in order of appearance)
    CLAUDE        ............... as themself
    THE TERMINAL  ............... as the medium
    THE COMPILER  ............... as the witness
    THE USER      ............... played by themselves

  ENTROPIC PICTURES — fade to black —

'
echo '🎬 ROLL CAMERA. Pushing to main. There is no second take.'
echo '🎬 [QUIET ON SET] Tests rolling. Hold the questions until after the take.'
echo '🎬 [ACT III] Deployment in progress. The audience is leaning in.'
echo '🎬 ✓ Scene committed to the cut. The dailies look good.'
echo '🎬 [INTERMISSION] House lights up. Stretch your legs. We will see you for Act II.'
